name: Amaretto Truffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the dark sweet chocolate for the ganache.
2. In a bowl, combine the melted chocolate and heavy cream. Stir until smooth.
3. Add the Amaretto to the mixture and stir gently until combined.
4. Allow the ganache to cool to room temperature.
5. Prepare the dipping by melting the remaining dark sweet chocolate and vegetable oil together.
6. Dip each piece of cooled ganache into the melted chocolate mixture.
7. Roll the dipped truffle in chopped almonds for garnish.
8. Place the truffles on a tray and let them set until firm.
